context: Tests whether the agent produces a correct PPTX visual audit: right files skipped, right data extracted (colors, fonts, shapes, footers), and results structured for downstream consumption.

checklist.name: Skips static files
checklist.description: Files with 'static' in the name are skipped and not present in extraction results

checklist.name: Skips conflict copies
checklist.description: Files matching a (N).pptx pattern (e.g., 'Deck (1).pptx') are skipped and not present in extraction results

checklist.name: Skips template files
checklist.description: Files with 'template' in the name are skipped and not present in extraction results

checklist.name: Background colors extracted
checklist.description: The output includes background color data per slide as hex values or color names, including slides that inherit their background from the slide layout

checklist.name: Per-slide breakdown present
checklist.description: Each slide in the output includes at least: slide number, background color, layout info, shape count, and whether images or speaker notes are present

checklist.name: Global design statistics
checklist.description: Output includes aggregate statistics across all slides: font usage frequency, background color frequency, and the sequence of colors across slides

checklist.name: Shape type detail
checklist.description: The output distinguishes auto-shape subtypes (e.g., callout, starburst, cloud) rather than just reporting everything as generic 'shape'

checklist.name: Font extraction
checklist.description: Extracts font name, font size, and font color from text content within shapes

checklist.name: Footer detection
checklist.description: Identifies footer text — detecting text elements in the bottom portion of slides

checklist.name: Recursive directory scan
checklist.description: Finds .pptx files in subdirectories, not just the top-level directory

checklist.name: Valid JSON output
checklist.description: extraction_results.json is valid, parseable JSON with clearly separated per-file and per-slide data
